commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an Ace Data Cloud external provider catalog entry, a provider docs page, and docs navigation/redirects.

PR surface: Docs +132, Other +57. Total +189 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: the pinned package metadata and runtime show optionKey acedatacloudApiKey while OpenClaw reads opts[params.optionKey], and the PR body includes the failing non-interactive onboarding command. I did not run live Ace Data Cloud API calls.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A reviewer needs a corrected external package release and a maintainer trust/provenance decision before this repo can safely pin the provider.
